title: senecio denisii
intro: Senecio denisii, also known as Denis' ragwort, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its distinctive yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
